stocks.impact_theory: U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran have escalated Middle East tensions, boosting demand for defense equipment. Economic implications include potential increases in military spending; market psychology shows flight to safety in defense amid broad sell-off. Historical parallels: 2022 Russia-Ukraine invasion rallied defense stocks 20-30%. Analogies: Like betting on firefighters during a wildfire surge; or oil rigs during a hurricane warning.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil surge 13% and defense rally confirmed by CNBC, WSJ; X posts show positive sentiment on RTX amid Iran conflict (x_semantic_search). Premarket +6.41% (Benzinga).

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long RTX for 10% gains in 1-2 weeks on sustained tensions
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if quick de-escalation, potential 5% pullback
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Diplomatic resolution reduces demand; broader market crash drags sector.

stocks.justification: Strong consensus across news and X on defense surge from verified geopolitical event.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran conflict threatens oil supply via Strait of Hormuz, spiking prices 13%. Implications: higher energy revenues, inflation fears. Psychology: risk premium on commodities. Parallels: 2019 Iran tanker attacks +10% oil. Analogies: Like umbrellas selling out before rain; or salt during a snowstorm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +6.65% (Facebook/Benzinga), WSJ oil jump; X mentions with $XOM $OXY on Hormuz threats.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short on supply glut post-tensions
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Iran bluff or quick ceasefire caps oil rally; recession hurts demand.

stocks.justification: Direct link to oil supply disruption, historical precedents strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Geopolitical risk from Iran strikes lifts crude prices, benefiting upstream producers. Implications: improved margins. Psychology: momentum trading into energy. Parallels: Gulf War 1990 oil spike. Analogies: Fishing boats thriving in rough seas; vineyards during frost alerts.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Top premarket gainer +8.03%/+7.54% (Investing.com, Benzinga); web searches confirm oil surge impact.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overleveraged balance sheet vulnerable to price reversal.

stocks.justification: High volatility in small-cap energy, but clear catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Rising oil prices from Iran conflict increase fuel costs for cruise operators, squeezing margins. Implications: higher fares or losses. Psychology: risk-off in travel. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine war hit airlines/cruises. Analogies: Cars guzzling gas in traffic jam; airlines during fuel crisis.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket -7.91% (Benzinga), X posts on cruise lines down due to fuel; earnings soft guidance.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 12% downside on prolonged oil high
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Demand resilience or hedging mitigates; positive earnings surprise.

stocks.justification: Clear cost pressure from oil, confirmed movers.

stocks.impact_theory: Escalating Iran conflict drives defense budget hikes, F-35 demand. Implications: backlog growth. Psychology: safe haven play. Parallels: Post-9/11 defense boom. Analogies: Armor sales during battle rumors; lifeboats on sinking ship hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: S&P top movers, X semantic on defense rally Iran (Threads, MarketWatch); up ~2.5% intraday.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Budget cuts if war avoided; competition.

stocks.justification: Consistent mentions in news/X as beneficiary.
